title: Create: Structures Overhaul - BOP integration
description: Adds Biomes O' Plenty support to the Create: Structures Overhaul mod by introducing new structures that fit custom BOP biomes.
body:
# Create: Structures Overhaul – BOP Integration (Add-on)

This mod is an official add-on for **Create: Structures Overhaul**, adding full support for **Biomes O' Plenty**, including themed structures and blocks.

[![Ko-fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/Ko--fi-Support%20Me-29ABE0?style=for-the-badge&logo=ko-fi&logoColor=white)](https://ko-fi.com/denmoth)  [![Join Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Join%20Server-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/BCXqNfPnSh)  [![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-Visit-181717?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/denmoth/create_structures_overhaul)  [![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-Visit-FF7F50?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/denmoth/projects)


## Features

*   Adds Create-themed structures to Biomes O' Plenty’s unique biomes using BOP blocks.
*   Seamless integration with BOP world generation.
*   Structures blend naturally with their biome environments.
*   Designed to match the aesthetics and mechanics of Create.

## Requirements

*   [Create: Structures Overhaul](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-structures-overhaul)
*   [Create](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create)
*   [Biomes O’ Plenty](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/biomes-o-plenty)

⚠️ This mod is currently in **beta** and may be unstable. Use at your own risk.
